Package neqsim.process.safety.compliance

Class StandardsDesignReview

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.compliance.StandardsDesignReview
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class StandardsDesignReview extends Object implements Serializable
Standards-aware process design review for NeqSim process systems.

The review currently orchestrates checks that have direct NeqSim model support: TR1965 gas scrubber conformity and NORSOK P-002 line-sizing screening. The output is a StandardsComplianceReport, so agents can combine calculated evidence with document evidence from standards or technical-requirement reviews.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

    • review

      public StandardsComplianceReport review(ProcessSystem process)
      Reviews a process system and returns a populated compliance report.
      Parameters:
      process - process system to review
      Returns:
      standards compliance report with calculated evidence
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if process is null
